bird.name: Red-collared widowbird
bird.summary: The red-collared widowbird (Euplectes ardens) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. Red-collared widowbirds are found in grasslands…

relations.subject: Red-collared widowbird
relations.evidence: Red-collared widowbirds are found in grasslands and bush clearings in western and southern Africa
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Red-collared widowbird
relations.evidence: While their habitats are varied, they are often found in open grasslands, agricultural areas, clearings in forests, and on slopes with limited tree coverage
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
